rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA REUTER VS. HELGA GRAYSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Appoint A Receiver For Thinkicity, Llc
rulings.Rulings: 1.)GRANT-PERSONAL INJURY IN PART.PLAINTIFF TO RETURN $34,000 TO THINKCITY.DEFENDANT TO POST $15, 000 BOND 2.) GRANT APPOINT RECEIVER, PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER RE PROPOSED RECEIVER & BONDS,IF NO AGENT,EACH TO SUBMIT 3 NAMES. 3.) SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 4,5,& 6 DERIVATIVES. 4.) GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 9, 21 AND REQUEST FOR FEES.(302/REQ/PB)
